title: onobrychis crista-galli var. gaertneriana
intro: Onobrychis crista-galli var. gaertneriana, also known as Gaertner's sainfoin or sainfoin, is a perennial legume plant belonging to the pea family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of onobrychis crista-galli var. gaertneriana include its ability to support digestive health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and teas, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including gastrointestinal issues and infections.
